title: eriophyllum lanatum var. leucophyllum
intro: Eriophyllum lanatum var. leucophyllum, also known as California fleabane or woolly sunflower, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This perennial plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eriophyllum lanatum var. leucophyllum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular natural remedy for various ailments. Eriophyllum lanatum var. leucophyllum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal uses.
